rationale: The cited paper is highly aligned with the citing paper’s core outcomes: both examine grocery coupon promotions and their effects on total basket size/composition and unplanned purchases. The citing note explicitly positions its contribution as extending prior sales-promotion work from promoted-brand outcomes to basket-level effects, which matches the cited paper’s stated contribution on basket-level impact of unexpected in-store coupons. Given this strong conceptual overlap (and a verified DOI match), this is not an obvious incidental mention.
